releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Community review follow-up release.

- Remove view detaching on plugin unload.
- Add English README overview.
- Declare CodeMirror runtime dependencies.
- Use activeDocument for popout compatibility.
- Add artifact attestations for release assets.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial community release of Heading Mindmap.

- Open Markdown heading structures as editable mind maps.
- Edit selected section content in a bottom pane.
- Preserve Markdown as the source of truth.
